---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working as expected
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: dellipse
---

## Describe the bug

A clear, concise description of what's going wrong.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to see.

## Screenshots

If helpful, paste screenshots or a screen recording.

## Environment

- URL: 
- Browser / device:
- Container image tag (if known):

## Additional context

Logs from `docker logs <instance>` help a lot (web, worker, and mcp all share one container's log).
